prompt: Perfectly symmetrical front-on view of a painted doorway — blush pink door centered in a powder blue wall. Flat, even lighting with no shadows. Clean, pristine painted surfaces. A small mint green planter on each side of the door, mirrored exactly. Storybook dollhouse quality. Controlled pastel palette — pink, blue, mint, cream. 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
